block_03: With a variety of advertising options, Google Ads is considered to be one of the best advertising platforms by most marketing professionals. But as they say, don’t put all your eggs in one basket. Why?
block_04: With 5.6 billion searches every day, there is no doubt that Google has the resources to reach every audience segment imaginable. However, the growing competition has led to increases in cost per click (CPC) (especially when advertising highly competitive categories), and Google Ads itself became less effective and has multiple restrictions in our vertical (many trading instruments are banned). So what alternatives can be as effective and profitable?
block_06: Being the biggest social media platform, Facebook targets 2.9 billion users worldwide. Why Facebook Ads?
block_09: Advanced targeting options: location, demographics, consumer behaviour, interests
block_10: Strict set of rules: account can be banned, sometimes for no apparent reasons
block_11: Possible to divert traffic through a series of pre-landings (more effective)
block_16: With native ads, the audience size depends on the platform of your choice (we’re talking millions of users).
block_17: Suitable for any product or service category
block_19: Ads blend in with the content of each page
block_20: Measuring performance can be complex (needs right tools and metrics)
block_21: Reaches audiences on a wide scale
block_22: Wide targeting options (location, interests, browser, device)
block_24: Since its release in 2016, TikTok has taken the world by storm, amassing over 1 billion users worldwide and becoming the #1 platform for short-form videos.
block_25: Optimizable campaigns based on objectives (reach, traffic, app installs, lead generation, etc.)
block_27: Higher engagement than other social media platforms (video content)
block_28: 53% of all users are between 18-25 and 57% are female
block_29: Different ad types (in-feed, TopView, brand takeover, etc.)
block_30: More expensive ($10 per 1,000 impressions - minimum spend $500)
block_33: With over 2.35 billion monthly active users, Instagram is another great social media platform worth checking out.
block_34: Visual content - stories ads, photos, videos, carousel etc.
block_35: Not a click-friendly platform, links are less effective
block_36: Can be linked to Facebook Business account
block_38: Advertise to people, even if you don’t have a following
block_39: Only works with cost-per-click (CPC) or pay-per-impressions (CPM) models
block_42: Advertising is tricky, being able to generate quality traffic requires experience and budget. Making the right decisions when choosing an advertising method can have a great impact on your campaign.
block_43: We want your campaigns to be as effective as possible, so feel free to message your manager if you need any help!
